RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,282.74 AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY, KIMBERLY E.
